name: year splits with a column set to a specific year
description: Test case for year splits with a column set to a specific year
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2000,2001,2002,2003,2004,2005,2006,2007,2008,2009,2010,2011,2012,2013,2014,2015,2016,2017,2018,2019,2020,2021,2022,2023]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years WHERE player.pos IN ('DST')), "td62b26ed5ab7efe344083fa6cd9d2403" as materialized (select "team", "year", count(*) as "rate_type_total_count" from ((select "h" as "team", "year" from "nfl_games" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2000, 2001, 2002, 2003, 2004, 2005, 2006, 2007, 2008, 2009, 2010, 2011, 2012, 2013, 2014, 2015, 2016, 2017, 2018, 2019, 2020, 2021, 2022, 2023)) union all (select "v" as "team", "year" from "nfl_games" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2000, 2001, 2002, 2003, 2004, 2005, 2006, 2007, 2008, 2009, 2010, 2011, 2012, 2013, 2014, 2015, 2016, 2017, 2018, 2019, 2020, 2021, 2022, 2023))) as "g" group by "team", "year"), "player_year_teams" as materialized (select "pid", "year", (array_agg(tm ORDER BY game_count DESC, tm ASC))[1] as team from (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."tm", count(*) as "game_count" from "player_gamelogs" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" = 'REG' and "nfl_games"."year" in (2000, 2001, 2002, 2003, 2004, 2005, 2006, 2007, 2008, 2009, 2010, 2011, 2012, 2013, 2014, 2015, 2016, 2017, 2018, 2019, 2020, 2021, 2022, 2023) and "player_gamelogs"."year" in (2000, 2001, 2002, 2003, 2004, 2005, 2006, 2007, 2008, 2009, 2010, 2011, 2012, 2013, 2014, 2015, 2016, 2017, 2018, 2019, 2020, 2021, 2022, 2023) group by "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."tm") as "player_year_team_counts" group by "pid", "year"), "t7ff337dfcee3714ec073738012aea39d" as materialized (select "team", "year", count(*) as "rate_type_total_count" from ((select "h" as "team", "year" from "nfl_games" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2000, 2001, 2002, 2003, 2004, 2005, 2006, 2007, 2008, 2009, 2010, 2011, 2012, 2013, 2014, 2015, 2016, 2017, 2018, 2019, 2020, 2021, 2022, 2023)) union all (select "v" as "team", "year" from "nfl_games" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2000, 2001, 2002, 2003, 2004, 2005, 2006, 2007, 2008, 2009, 2010, 2011, 2012, 2013, 2014, 2015, 2016, 2017, 2018, 2019, 2020, 2021, 2022, 2023))) as "g" group by "team", "year"), "rate_aggregate_7312e7c81de9" as materialized (select "nfl_games"."year", "nfl_plays"."pos_team" as "team_code", SUM(epa) AS m_edd03a17ae5f from "nfl_plays" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "nfl_plays"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."year" in (2000, 2001, 2002, 2003, 2004, 2005, 2006, 2007, 2008, 2009, 2010, 2011, 2012, 2013, 2014, 2015, 2016, 2017, 2018, 2019, 2020, 2021, 2022, 2023) and not "nfl_plays"."play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."wp" between 0.2 and 0.8 group by nfl_plays.pos_team, "nfl_games"."year"), "rate_aggregate_929d5196ac01" as materialized (select "nfl_games"."year", "nfl_plays"."pos_team" as "team_code", SUM(epa) AS m_edd03a17ae5f from "nfl_plays" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "nfl_plays"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."year" in (2000, 2001, 2002, 2003, 2004, 2005, 2006, 2007, 2008, 2009, 2010, 2011, 2012, 2013, 2014, 2015, 2016, 2017, 2018, 2019, 2020, 2021, 2022, 2023) and not "nfl_plays"."play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."wp" between 0.2 and 0.8 group by nfl_plays.pos_team, "nfl_games"."year") select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, CAST(MAX(rate_aggregate_7312e7c81de9.m_edd03a17ae5f) AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(MAX(td62b26ed5ab7efe344083fa6cd9d2403.rate_type_total_count) AS DECIMAL), 0) AS team_ep_added_from_plays_0, CAST(MAX(rate_aggregate_929d5196ac01.m_edd03a17ae5f) AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(MAX(t7ff337dfcee3714ec073738012aea39d.rate_type_total_count) AS DECIMAL), 0) AS team_ep_added_from_plays_1, "player_years"."year", "player"."pos" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "td62b26ed5ab7efe344083fa6cd9d2403" on "td62b26ed5ab7efe344083fa6cd9d2403"."team" = "player"."current_nfl_team" and "td62b26ed5ab7efe344083fa6cd9d2403"."year" = "player_years"."year" left join "player_year_teams" on "player_year_teams"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "player_year_teams"."year" = "player_years"."year" left join "rate_aggregate_7312e7c81de9" on "rate_aggregate_7312e7c81de9"."team_code" = "player_year_teams"."team" and "rate_aggregate_7312e7c81de9"."year" = "player_years"."year" left join "t7ff337dfcee3714ec073738012aea39d" on "t7ff337dfcee3714ec073738012aea39d"."team" = "player"."current_nfl_team" and "t7ff337dfcee3714ec073738012aea39d"."year" = 2023 left join "rate_aggregate_929d5196ac01" on "rate_aggregate_929d5196ac01"."team_code" = "player_year_teams"."team" and "rate_aggregate_929d5196ac01"."year" = "player_years"."year" where player.pos IN ('DST') group by player.fname, player.lname, "player_years"."year", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 4 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
